utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five of these items. Each item is fully specified: health_coverage includes physical and mental health insurance with costs; property_coverage includes home/contents insurance with costs; travel_coverage includes travel insurance with costs; additional_services lists enhancement services with costs; total_budget provides a complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Therefore, all items are present and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three main insurance components and additional services. For health coverage, the provider is listed as 'LifeFirst / HealthFirst', meaning the assistant combined LifeFirst Standard Plan (rating 9) and HealthFirst Standard Plan (rating 7). For property coverage, the provider is 'LifeFirst / PrimeHome', which corresponds to LifeFirst Standard Coverage (rating 9) and PrimeHome Premium Coverage (rating 3). For travel coverage, the provider is 'PrimeTravel', which matches PrimeTravel Premium Plan (rating 3). The additional services mention 24/7 support, priority claims processing, premium medical network, and telemedicine — these align respectively with 'Telemedicine Services' (rating 10) and 'Premium Medical Network' (rating 7) under enhancement services. Therefore, the final mapping includes all these selected plans and services with their respective ratings.
